phonon_IDs.title: Phonon Ids
phonon_IDs.description: Identfiers for phonon documents associated with this material.

database_IDs.title: Database Ids
database_IDs.description: External database IDs corresponding to this material.

possible_species.title: Possible Species
possible_species.description: Possible charged species in this material.

weighted_surface_energy_EV_PER_ANG2.title: Weighted Surface Energy Ev Per Ang2

has_reconstructed.title: Has Reconstructed
has_reconstructed.description: Whether the material has any reconstructed surfaces.

bulk_modulus.title: Bulk Modulus
bulk_modulus.description: Voigt, Reuss, and Voigt-Reuss-Hill averages of the bulk modulus in GPa.

shear_modulus.title: Shear Modulus
shear_modulus.description: Voigt, Reuss, and Voigt-Reuss-Hill averages of the shear modulus in GPa.

total_magnetization_normalized_vol.title: Total Magnetization Normalized Vol
total_magnetization_normalized_vol.description: Total magnetization normalized by volume in μB/Å³.

total_magnetization_normalized_formula_u.title: Total Magnetization Normalized Formula Units
total_magnetization_normalized_formula_u.description: Total magnetization normalized by formula unit in μB/f.u. .

num_unique_magnetic_sites.title: Num Unique Magnetic Sites
num_unique_magnetic_sites.description: The number of unique magnetic sites.

dos.description: Density of states data for the material.

dos_energy_up.title: Dos Energy Up
dos_energy_up.description: Spin-up DOS band gap in eV.

dos_energy_down.title: Dos Energy Down
dos_energy_down.description: Spin-down DOS band gap in eV.

bandstructure.description: Band structure data for the material.

is_gap_direct.title: Is Gap Direct
is_gap_direct.description: Whether the band gap is direct.

is_metal.title: Is Metal
is_metal.description: Whether the material is a metal.

uncorrected_energy_per_atom.title: Uncorrected Energy Per Atom
uncorrected_energy_per_atom.description: The total DFT energy of this material per atom in eV/atom.

energy_per_atom.title: Energy Per Atom
energy_per_atom.description: The total corrected DFT energy of this material per atom in eV/atom.

formation_energy_per_atom.title: Formation Energy Per Atom
formation_energy_per_atom.description: The formation energy per atom in eV/atom.

energy_above_hull.title: Energy Above Hull
energy_above_hull.description: The energy above the hull in eV/Atom.

is_stable.title: Is Stable
is_stable.description: Flag for whether this material is on the hull and therefore stable.

equilibrium_reaction_energy_per_atom.title: Equilibrium Reaction Energy Per Atom
equilibrium_reaction_energy_per_atom.description: The reaction energy of a stable entry from the neighboring equilibrium stable materials in eV. Also known as the inverse distance to hull.

decomposes_to.title: Decomposes To
decomposes_to.description: List of decomposition data for this material. Only valid for metastable or unstable material.

nsites.title: Nsites
nsites.description: Total number of sites in the structure.

elements.title: Elements
elements.description: List of elements in the material.

chemsys.title: Chemical System
chemsys.description: Dash-separated string of elements in the material.

volume.title: Volume
volume.description: Total volume for this structure in Å³.

density_atomic.title: Packing Density
density_atomic.description: The atomic packing density in Å³/atom.

material_id.title: Material Id
material_id.description: The Materials Project ID of the material, used as a universal reference across property documents.This comes in the form: mp-******.

deprecated.title: Deprecated
deprecated.description: Whether this property document is deprecated.

deprecation_reasons.title: Deprecation Reasons
deprecation_reasons.description: List of deprecation tags detailing why this document isn't valid.

last_updated.title: Last Updated
last_updated.description: Timestamp for the most recent calculation update for this property.

origins.title: Origins
origins.description: Dictionary for tracking the provenance of properties.

warnings.title: Warnings
warnings.description: Any warnings related to this property.

structure.title: Structure
structure.description: The lowest energy structure for this material.

task_ids.title: Calculation IDs
task_ids.description: List of Calculations IDs associated with this material.

has_props.title: Has Props
has_props.description: List of properties that are available for a given material.

SummaryDoc.title: SummaryDoc
SummaryDoc.description:
Summary information about materials and their properties, useful for materials
screening studies and searching.

schema.description: Comma-separated list of material_id values to query on
schema.title: Material Ids

schema.description: Query by formula including anonymized formula or by including wild cards. A comma delimited string list of anonymous formulas or regular formulas can also be provided.
schema.title: Formula

schema.description: A comma delimited string list of chemical systems. Wildcards for unknown elements only supported for single chemsys queries
schema.title: Chemsys

schema.description: Query by elements in the material composition as a comma-separated list
schema.title: Elements

schema.description: Query by excluded elements in the material composition as a comma-separated list
schema.title: Exclude Elements

schema.description: Comma delimited list of element symbols appended with oxidation states.                 (e.g. Cr2+,O2-)
schema.title: Possible Species

schema.description: Crystal system of the material. If a comma-separated string, will query by multiple crystal systems.
schema.title: Crystal System

schema.description: Space group number of the material. If a comma-separated string, will query by multiple space group numbers.
schema.title: Spacegroup Number

schema.description: Space group symbol of the material. If a comma-separated string, will query by multiple space group numbers.
schema.title: Spacegroup Symbol

schema.description: Whether the material is stable.
schema.title: Is Stable

schema.description: Whether the material is theoretical.
schema.title: Theoretical

schema.description: Magnetic ordering of the material.
schema.title: Ordering

schema.description: Whether a band gap is direct or not.
schema.title: Is Gap Direct

schema.description: Whether the material is considered a metal.
schema.title: Is Metal

schema.description: Page number to request (takes precedent over _limit and _skip).

schema.description: Max number of entries to return in a single query. Limited to 1000.
schema.title: Limit

schema.description: Fields to project from SummaryDoc as a list of comma separated strings.                    Fields include: `prop_origins` `phonon_IDs` `theoretical` `database_IDs` `possible_species` `weighted_surface_energy_EV_PER_ANG2` `weighted_surface_energy` `weighted_work_function` `surface_anisotropy` `shape_factor` `has_reconstructed` `e_ij_max` `e_total` `e_ionic` `e_electronic` `n` `bulk_modulus` `shear_modulus` `universal_anisotropy` `homogeneous_poisson` `is_magnetic` `ordering` `total_magnetization` `total_magnetization_normalized_vol` `total_magnetization_normalized_formula_units` `num_magnetic_sites` `num_unique_magnetic_sites` `types_of_magnetic_species` `dos` `dos_energy_up` `dos_energy_down` `bandstructure` `band_gap` `cbm` `vbm` `efermi` `is_gap_direct` `is_metal` `grain_boundaries` `xas` `uncorrected_energy_per_atom` `energy_per_atom` `formation_energy_per_atom` `energy_above_hull` `is_stable` `equilibrium_reaction_energy_per_atom` `decomposes_to` `builder_meta` `nsites` `elements` `nelements` `composition` `composition_reduced` `formula_pretty` `formula_anonymous` `chemsys` `volume` `density` `density_atomic` `symmetry` `material_id` `deprecated` `deprecation_reasons` `last_updated` `origins` `warnings` `structure` `property_name` `task_ids` `has_props`
schema.title: Fields

schema.description: Include all fields.
schema.title: All Fields

schema.description: Query by license. Can be commercial or non-commercial, or both
schema.title: License

schema.description: Comma delimited fields to sort with. Prefixing '-' to a field will force a sort in descending order.
schema.title: Sort Fields

schema.description: Query by batch identifier
schema.title: Batch Id

schema.description: Exclude batch identifier
schema.title: Batch Id Not Eq

schema.description: Query by a comma-separated list of batch identifiers
schema.title: Batch Id Eq Any

schema.description: Exclude a comma-separated list of batch identifiers
schema.title: Batch Id Neq Any

schema.description: Optional. If set to 'legacy', MP identifier fields in the response are returned in the form 'mp-149'. If set to 'alpha', they are returned in the padded AlphaID form 'mp-aaaaaaft'. If omitted (or set to any other value), identifiers are returned in their stored form. This is a purely cosmetic transform; query inputs accept either shape regardless.
schema.title: Id Format
